narrative: OMX30 opens into a mixed European backdrop (DAX -0.28% vs CAC/FTSE positive) but derives support from stronger US overnight closes, particularly NASDAQ's +1.12% run. The index sits at 98% of 52-week range, just -0.5% from highs, supported by genuine bull technicals: +9.2% above 200-MA, MACD positive, ADX 36.1 (strong directional bias). However, stochastic K/D at 81/85.8 flags overbought conditions and mean reversion risk. USD/SEK at 9.648 (+0.08%) provides tailwind for export-heavy names. Copper's +0.89% jump bolsters industrial input optimism. The weighted correlation signal remains slightly positive (+0.087%), but VIX's +1.61% tick and US yield rise (+0.22%) introduce caution—rates now at 4.485% may start pressuring growth/tech and refinancing-sensitive real estate.
morningBrief: OMX30 likely opens +0.3% to +0.5% on transatlantic equity strength and USD support, but expect choppy trading into 3180 resistance (50-MA). Key tailwinds: USD/SEK firm, copper strong, banks benefiting from wider NIM (10Y +22bp). Key headwinds: overbought stochastic threatens pullback, VIX +1.61% signals rising volatility, oil +1.22% may clip consumer margins. Watch Boliden (copper/gold exposure), Volvo B & Atlas Copco (USD/SEK + industrial demand), SEB/Handelsbanken (NIM expansion). Monitor US Jobless Claims at 14:30 CET for macro pivot. Break above 3180 targets 3210; breakdown below 3100 (lower Bollinger) risks 3050. Reduce position size on any gap-up open given overbought technicals.
drivers: US equity strength (NASDAQ +1.12%, S&P +0.72%) offsetting DAX weakness
Copper rally (+0.89%) supporting industrials and Boliden
OMX30 bull market structure: +9.2% vs 200-MA, MACD above signal
Overbought stochastic (K=81, D=85.8) signals mean reversion risk

sectorImpacts.reason: US 10Y yield +22bp to 4.485% supports NIM expansion; Swedish yield curve should follow, widening deposit-to-lending spreads.
USD/SEK strength (+0.08%) boosts export pricing power. Copper +0.89% signals industrial demand resilience. Oil +1.22% may offset some input-cost relief.
Copper +0.89% and gold flat (-0.35%) provide direct revenue uplift for Boliden; SSAB benefits from stabilizing steel/commodity complex.
NASDAQ +1.12% provides positive sentiment; however, rising US yields (4.485% +22bp) compress DCF multiples. Neutral net effect.
VIX +1.61% and rising yields create slight defensive bid, but no major risk-off signal. Slight positive tilt.
US yield +22bp will pressurize Swedish mortgage rates and REITs' refinancing costs; risk-free rate rise headwinds discount-rate sensitivity.
Oil +1.22% pressures discretionary spending; Brent upside may bleed into fuel/transport costs, dampening consumer confidence.

watchList.reason: Copper +0.89% is direct revenue driver; gold steady. Positioned to gain from commodity strength.
USD/SEK +0.08% and industrial demand signals (copper up) support export margins and capex cycle.
Strong USD/SEK tailwind; copper recovery suggests industrial activity rebound.
US 10Y +22bp to 4.485% will ripple into Swedish rates; NIM expansion play.
watchList.catalyst: Deposit repricing, net interest income revision

watchList.reason: Oil +1.22% and rising rates pressure consumer discretionary; weak EUR/SEK (flat at 11.03) does not offset input-cost headwinds.
Rising yields (US 10Y +22bp) raise cost of capital; refinancing risk for RE sector.
NASDAQ positive overnight but tech yield sensitivity offsets gains; no clear directional catalyst.

econCalendarAlert: 14:30 CET: US Jobless Claims (consensus 235k). No major Swedish economic data scheduled. Watch for ECB comments on inflation/rates.
topRisk: Stochastic overbought (K=81, D=85.8) signals sharp mean-reversion pullback if sentiment shifts. VIX +1.61% and rising rates (US 10Y +22bp) could trigger profit-taking on risk assets. Geopolitical escalation in Ukraine (per news headlines) could spike volatility further.
technicalSummary: MACD above signal line with hist=+7.233 (momentum positive)
ADX 36.1 with bullish DI bias (strong trending market)
RSI 65 (neutral, not yet overbought at individual level)
Bollinger %B=0.82 upper half (elevated but not extreme)
